infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: SE7EN FIT uses HealthKit to read your workout, nutrition, and health data to track your progress.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: SE7EN FIT uses HealthKit to save your workout and nutrition data.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SE7EN FIT needs camera access to scan food and take profile photos.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: SE7EN FIT sends workout, attendance, payment, progress, and gym notification reminders.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: SE7EN FIT uses motion and fitness data to improve live workout and activity tracking.

plugins.cameraPermission: SE7EN FIT needs camera access to scan food and take profile photos.

plugins.photosPermission: SE7EN FIT needs photo library access to select profile photos.
